diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,157 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, Runtime, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals, knownUserAgents
+- Reads as: Context
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter
+- Safe summary: Runtime detection utility; exports env() for accessing environment variables per runtime (node, deno, bun, workerd, fastly, edge-light)
+
+## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: accepts
+- Reads as: accepts
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
+- Safe summary: Main index re-exports accepts utility for matching Accept headers
+
+## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
+- Main exports or names: accepts, Accept, acceptsConfig, defaultMatch
+- Reads as: Context, parseAccept, AcceptHeader
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Matches Accept headers with configuration; returns best matched type or default
+
+## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: GetConnInfo (typedef)
+- Reads as: Context
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
+- Safe summary: Type-only exports; references ConnInfo types from types.ts
+
+## src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
+- Main exports or names: ConnInfo, NetAddrInfo, AddressType, GetConnInfo
+- Reads as: Context
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Connection info types; defines remote/net address info with transport details
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, rawCssString, minify
+- Reads as: (none) - standalone utilities
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Safe summary: CSS helper utilities; provides buildStyleString, minify, and common functions for css/cx/keyframes/viewTransition
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, createCssContext
+- Reads as: html, createCssContext, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Safe summary: Main CSS JSX helper; exports context functions for runtime CSS generation with class hashing
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, setCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie, generateCookie, generateSignedCookie
+- Reads as: Context, parse, parseSigned, serialize, serializeSigned
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie
+- Safe summary: Cookie helper for reading/writing cookies with signed support and __Secure- and __Host- prefixes
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: showRoutes, inspectRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: Hono, Env, RouterRoute, getColorEnabled, findTargetHandler, isMiddleware
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/dev
+- Safe summary: Development utilities; inspects and displays route handlers with optional colorization
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware, CreateHandlersInterface
+- Reads as: Hono, H, HandlerResponse, Env, MiddlewareHandler, HonoOptions, IntersectNonAnyTypes
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory
+- Safe summary: Factory pattern for creating Hono app instances and middleware; supports chaining 1-10 handlers with union types
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: html, raw
+- Reads as: escapeToBuffer, raw, resolveCallbackSync, stringBufferFromFile, HtmlEscaped, HtmlEscapedString, StringBufferWithCallbacks
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/html
+- Safe summary: HTML templating utilities; escapes text and resolves callback children for dynamic content
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy
+- Reads as: HTTPException, RequestHeader, fetch
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/proxy
+- Safe summary: HTTP proxy helper with RFC 9110 compliance; handles hop-by-hop headers to prevent injection attacks
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: Context, RouterRoute, GET_MATCH_RESULT, getPattern, splitRoutingPath
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/route
+- Safe summary: Route introspection utilities; get matched routes and path information from request context
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE, streamText
+- Reads as: stream, SSEMessage, streamSSE, streamText, StreamingApi
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Safe summary: Main streaming index; re-exports stream, SSE streaming, and text streaming helpers
+
+## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
+- Reads as: Context, StreamingApi, resolveCallback, isOldBunVersion
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Server-Sent Events streaming helper class; auto-formats events with id/event/retry fields
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, StreamingApi
+- Reads as: Context, StreamingApi, isOldBunVersion
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Base streaming utility; manages response stream with TransformStream and error handling
+
+## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamText
+- Reads as: Context, TEXT_PLAIN, stream
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Plain text streaming helper; sets text/plain content type with chunked encoding
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssg (re-exported), ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG
+- Reads as: ssg, isSSGContext, disabledSSG, redirectPlugin, defaultPlugin
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG helper index; exports toSSG function and SSG-related middleware utilities
+
+## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, SSG_PARAMS, SSGDisabledResponse
+- Reads as: Context, Env, MiddlewareHandler, isDynamicRoute
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
+- Safe summary: SSG middleware for detecting SSG context; includes deprecated SSG_DISABLED_RESPONSE
+
+## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
+- Main exports or names: toSSG, fetchRou
